history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy hair is taking a mirror selfie. He is wearing a black baseball cap with a white logo that appears to be an "X" with a skull inside it. He's also wearing a white knit sweater with a bold red graphic pattern all over it. The pattern is intricate and appears to depict a scene with figures and possibly text. He is holding a smartphone with a triple-lens camera in his right hand, angled to capture his reflection. The background is a slightly cluttered room, with a white wall on the left and a mirror on the right. There are some clothes hanging in the background, and a framed picture or sign with pink text that reads "THXNSMN" is visible on the wall above him. The lighting is somewhat dim, creating a casual and candid mood. The color palette is dominated by the white and red of the sweater, contrasted with the black of the cap and the neutral tones of the background. The overall impression is a stylish, modern selfie captured in a personal space.
